description: Out-of-fold target encoding for categorical columns to prevent target leakage.

interface.input_shapes: X_train: pd.DataFrame, y_train: np.ndarray, X_test: pd.DataFrame, cat_features: list

usage_example: X_tr_enc, X_te_enc = transform(X_train, y_train, X_test, cat_features=['zip_code'])
known_pitfalls: Target encoding can cause target leakage if applied inside the cross-validation loop without out-of-fold estimation (this function is a direct encoder wrapper).
